## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Janice (Mantis) and Marcel (GrowthX) to explore potential synergies and collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both companies are bootstrapped, profitable, and experiencing rapid growth in the data/content space](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Mantis focuses on data commercialization and marketing optimization, while GrowthX specializes in content creation and organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Significant potential for partnership identified, leveraging complementary strengths in data and content](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Agreed to explore collaboration on specific client opportunities, starting with a Canadian retailer pitch](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

## Topics

### Company Overviews

  - [Mantis Group:](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
    
      - [Bootstrapped, \~$7M ARR, 13 employees (recently downsized from 26)](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [Two main focuses:](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
        1.  Helping brands optimize marketing through data-driven approaches
        2.  Assisting media owners in monetizing their data assets
      - [Pivoting towards data commercialization and AI-driven solutions](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [Key products: Sybil (attribution), lead generation, and data cleaning services](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

  - [GrowthX:](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
    
      - [Bootstrapped to $7M+ ARR, recently raised $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [50 employees, 50+ customers, with a 60-customer waitlist](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [Provides end-to-end content and organic growth services](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Developed proprietary workflow engine and AI-powered content creation system](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Led by experienced team from major tech and media companies](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Content creation for Mantis' clients (e.g., Canadian retailer, SingTao newspaper)](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Data partnerships leveraging Mantis' access to forum data (e.g., VerticalScope's 400+ forums)](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Integration of GrowthX's content workflows with Mantis' data commercialization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Cross-selling opportunities: content services for Mantis clients, data monetization for GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)

### Market Insights

  - [Growing importance of first-party data and content in digital marketing](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Shift towards viewing marketing as a profit center rather than a cost center](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Increasing demand for AI-powered solutions in content creation and data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Janice to send Marcel information on the Canadian retailer opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Janice to share Vertical Scope's data sell sheet with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Marcel to provide a pitch deck showcasing GrowthX's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [Janice to draft a summary of Mantis' data commercialization engine concept](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Both parties to identify one specific customer and use case to focus on for initial collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/F1PbBYWkszyi4sH7BxxzfyVRgeNE9Rfy?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
